MyKHAS

Türkçe

The Invention of Academicians and Students of Our Molecular Biology and Genetics Department Has Been Patented

The invention titled “MICROALGAE-CONTAINING COMPOSITE GEL AND MICROALGAE-CONTAINING COMPOSITE GEL MANUFACTURING METHOD”, whose inventors are Prof. Dr. Önder Pekcan and Dr. Bengü Özuğur Uysal, faculty members of our Molecular Biology and Genetics Department, and their students İrem DOĞRUOĞLU, Yağmur AKARSU and Çağla Selen ŞEN, was patented in Turkey as of 29.11.2023, and a PCT application for an international patent was filed on 7.2.2024.

We congratulate our academics and students and wish them continued success.
